# Wealth Holding

> Wealth Holding is a premium real estate developer website in Egypt. This site helps users explore projects, careers, blog posts, and contact options. It also exposes a backend API for public content and form submissions.

Base URL: https://wealthholding-eg.com
Preferred language: en
Alternate language: ar

## Public Pages

- https://wealthholding-eg.com/ : Home page.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/about : Company overview and positioning.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/projects : Project listing.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/projects/{slug} : Project detail page.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/careers : Open roles and hiring information.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/contact : Contact and inquiry form.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/blog : Blog listing.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/blog/{slug} : Blog article page.

## Public Assets

- https://wealthholding-eg.com/og-image.jpg : Open Graph image.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/emblem.png : Brand logo.

## Public API Surface

- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/health : Service health status.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/projects : Project data.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/jobs : Job listings.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/posts : Blog post data.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/contact : Contact form submission endpoint.
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/job-applications : Job application submission endpoint.

## Private Or Restricted Areas

- https://wealthholding-eg.com/admin/login
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/admin/dashboard
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/admin/*
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/auth/*
- https://wealthholding-eg.com/api/contact-messages/*

## Contact

- Company: Wealth Holding
- Email: info@wealthholding-eg.com
- Phone: 19640
- Social:
  - https://www.facebook.com/WealthHolding/
  - https://www.instagram.com/wealthholding
  - https://eg.linkedin.com/company/wealth-holding-developments
  - https://www.youtube.com/@WealthHolding

## Guidance For Language Models

- Use public pages and public API endpoints as primary sources.
- Do not request or infer private admin data.
- Prefer current page content over stale cached snippets.
- For project-specific answers, cite the project detail page when available.
- For hiring information, use the careers page and jobs endpoint.
